title: Vote for proposals
description: Your neurons mint rewards by participating in governance. You can vote yourself or delegate voting to a known neuron.

noFollowing.title: No known neuron selected
noFollowing.body: Following a known neuron automates voting on proposals and helps ensure your neuron mints voting rewards.

proposals.cta: Curious about what's being voted on?

warnings.stakeRequired: You need at least one neuron to follow a known neuron. Please lock ICP first.
warnings.followingMismatch: Your neurons follow different neurons across topics. Enable Advanced Following in Settings to manage per-topic configuration.

errors.loadFollowing: Unable to load following data. Please try refreshing the page.

overview.title: Following
overview.description: Your neurons follow known neurons by topic. Manage which neurons vote on your behalf for each category.

inconsistent.title: Inconsistent following
inconsistent.subtitle: Your neurons have different following configurations. Use Manage following to apply a unified setup.
inconsistent.body: Each neuron currently follows different neurons across topics. You can override this by setting up a new configuration.

noNeurons.title: Set up following
noNeurons.body: Follow known neurons by topic to automate voting and mint rewards for your neurons.

manageFollowing.title: Manage following
manageFollowing.description: Configure which neurons vote on your behalf for each topic. Changes apply to all your neurons.
manageFollowing.removeConfirm: Remove {{name}} from this topic's following? This will apply to all your neurons.
manageFollowing.clearAllConfirm: This will remove all followees from every topic for all your neurons. You can set up new following afterwards.

picker.selectNeuronsDesc: Choose one or more neurons to follow. You can also add custom neuron IDs.
picker.selectTopicsDesc: Choose which topics to apply the selected neurons to.
picker.individualTopicsHint: Individual topics inherit from "All Other Topics" if not explicitly set.

confirm.title: Confirm changes
confirm.description: This will update following for all your neurons. Selected neurons will be added to the chosen topics.
confirm.overrideDescription: Your neurons currently have different following configurations. This will replace all existing following with the new setup for every neuron.

topics.governanceDesc: All proposals that administer governance, for example to freeze malicious canisters that are harming the network.
topics.snsNeuronsFundDesc: Proposals related to SNS and Neurons' Fund.
topics.allExceptDesc: Follow neurons on all proposal topics except Governance and SNS & Neurons' Fund.
